rationale: The formal EU accession process launch for Ukraine is a landmark positive signal for Ukrainians' future, while the war continues as the dominant background reality with no new major escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: The formal EU accession launch is a major positive milestone for Ukraine's future, offering hope and geopolitical anchoring even as the war continues.

top_events.title: Iran war live: US and Tehran signal peace deal within reach
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could free up US diplomatic bandwidth and resources, potentially affecting the pace of Western support for Ukraine — outcome still uncertain.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic for espionage
top_events.summary: Escalating US-China tensions could distract Western attention from Ukraine, though no direct impact on Ukrainian military situation this cycle.
